visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a large warehouse-style store with high ceilings and industrial shelving. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black translucent top, holds a plastic mesh bag filled with red pears. She speaks directly to the camera with an expressive face, using her hands to emphasize her points while standing in front of stacked boxes of produce. (2) The camera cuts briefly to a price display sign indicating 'U.S. RED ANJOU PEAR' for $130, then returns to the woman. She continues to handle the bag of pears, showing them from different angles. Other shoppers and a yellow forklift-like cart are visible in the blurred background under bright, cold warehouse lighting. (3) A new phase begins as a different young woman appears, wearing a purple cardigan and a grey-and-black patterned furry hat. She is in the same warehouse environment, holding the pears close to her face and sniffing them with a delighted expression. A hand enters the frame from the right holding a box of 'KOREAN MANDARINS' toward her. (4) The setting shifts to a domestic indoor environment with warm, soft lighting. Two women sit at a table; a wooden cutting board with sliced fruit pieces rests between them. They gesture toward the fruit and the camera while conversing. (5) The final shot is a close-up of a decorative glass with a gold bow on the stem, containing a dark red liquid and chunks of fruit, held against a soft-focus background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 檢便宜 隱藏優惠. [Variety]: 阿寶 香梨 130 塊. (2) [Slogan]: 美國紅安琪香梨 很值得嗎? (3) [Variety]: 划算! (4) [Subtitle]: 他原價160 折了30塊. (5) [Variety]: 折30塊就算划算? [Subtitle]: 哎呦 是紅色的這香梨. (6) [Subtitle]: 不錯喔 肉比較嫩對不對? 超好吃 那趕快買一個. (7) [Subtitle]: 像水梨加那種很熟的蘋果的結合. [Variety]: 像水梨加熟蘋果. (8) [Variety]: 拿來泡白酒也好吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 我選水果標準就是靠近 然後如果有聞到 到那個香氣就是他了. (10) [Variety]: 靈犬萊西告訴你秘訣. [Subtitle]: 萊西告訴你秘訣. (11) [Subtitle]: 用聞的? 用聞的? [Variety]: 選水果帶萊西. (12) [Subtitle]: 但是也不能太近 不然別人會覺得你很噁心. [Variety]: 對不要把鼻子蹭上去 只能這樣. (13) [Subtitle]: 這個有香嗎? 你聞看看 這個聞不到 個要看皮有沒有薄. [Variety]: 韓國蜜柑. (14) [Subtitle]: 好市多香梨 130元. 它非常的柔軟 建議還是削皮啦 因為我覺得它皮還是微澀. (15) [Subtitle]: 非常推薦 你們把它泡到酒裡面 它的那個果酸就會釋放出來. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後吸收酒精的那個甜分 就會變得整杯都超級讚 最推薦是配白葡萄.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in background, 1 additional person partially visible in warehouse.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one wearing a black sheer-sleeved top, the other wearing a purple cardigan and a furry hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse with high industrial shelves, bulk merchandise, and warehouse lighting; an indoor home setting with a plain wall and a wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A bright, high-energy electronic BGM with a strong 4/4 beat starts immediately. A female voice (Speaker 1) begins speaking with high arousal and a friendly, conversational tone. A faint background hum suggests a large indoor space. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect occurs as the speaker changes. A second female voice (Speaker 2) responds with a high-pitched, rising intonation indicating surprise or agreement. (3) Sounds of a plastic mesh bag rustling are clearly audible over the music. Both speakers engage in a rapid-fire dialogue with frequent laughter. The BGM remains consistent in tempo. (4) A digital 'whoosh' SFX signals a transition. The background acoustics change significantly, becoming drier and tighter (room tone). The vocal quality becomes more enunciated and intimate. (5) A rhythmic 'clink' of glassware and a soft liquid pouring sound are mixed into the final seconds. The BGM maintains its high tempo until a sharp cut-off at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Discovery -> Detailed Review -> Application/Recipe
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and recommend a specific fruit product (Red Anjou Pears) from Costco, demonstrating its value and suggesting a creative way to consume it with wine.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the Costco logo and detailed discussion of product pricing and quality within the store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing style with heavy text overlays and high-energy pacing to maintain viewer engagement.
